# Ugnė

> Personal website of Ugnė — tennis court competitor and QA engineer based in Vilnius, Lithuania.

## About

Ugnė explores the parallels between high-stakes QA engineering and competitive tennis: precision, strategy, stamina, and execution under pressure.

## Pages

- [Enter](https://ugne.online/): Site entry landing with door
- [Home](https://ugne.online/home/): Court competitor intro, match moments, preferred courts (SEB Arena, Bernardinai)
- [Career Statistics](https://ugne.online/statistics/): Tennis and QA career stats
- [Sponsorship](https://ugne.online/sponsorship/): Sponsorship tiers and opportunities
- [Say Cheese](https://ugne.online/say-cheese/): Visitor smile wall

## Plain-text mirrors

- [llms.txt](https://ugne.online/llms.txt): AI/crawler-friendly summary
- [about.txt](https://ugne.online/about.txt): Full plain-text site overview

## Contact

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ugne_le_
